mapper.select:
SELECT p.product_no, p.active, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.target_large, p.target_detail, p.status, p.product_start_dt, p.product_end_dt, p.created_by, p.created_dt, ca.admin_name AS created_by_name, aa.admin_name AS approved_by_name, COUNT(pt.terms_no) AS terms_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ptv.term_version_no IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_count FROM products p LEFT JOIN admins ca ON p.created_by = ca.admin_no LEFT JOIN admins aa ON p.approved_by = aa.admin_no LEFT JOIN product_terms pt ON p.product_no = pt.product_no LEFT JOIN product_term_versions ptv ON ptv.terms_no = pt.terms_no AND ptv.is_current = 'Y' WHERE p.active = 'Y'
AND p.product_type = #{productType}
AND p.product_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
GROUP BY p.product_no, p.active, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.target_large, p.target_detail, p.status, p.product_start_dt, p.product_end_dt, p.created_by, p.created_dt, ca.admin_name, aa.admin_name ORDER BY p.created_dt DESC

SELECT p.product_no, p.active, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.base_rate, p.max_rate, p.min_period_month, p.max_period_month, p.min_amount, p.max_amount, p.target_large, p.target_detail, p.description, p.interest_payment_type, p.product_tendency, p.status, p.product_start_dt, p.product_end_dt, p.created_by, p.created_dt, p.updated_by, p.updated_dt, p.approved_by, ca.admin_name AS created_by_name, aa.admin_name AS approved_by_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN admins ca ON p.created_by = ca.admin_no LEFT JOIN admins aa ON p.approved_by = aa.admin_no WHERE p.product_no = #{productNo}
